mapper.select: select dr.*, du.nx_DIU_wx_nick_name as driverName, du.nx_DIU_wx_phone as driverPhone from nx_dis_driver_route dr left join nx_distributer_user du on du.nx_distributer_user_id = dr.nx_ddr_driver_user_id where dr.nx_ddr_plan_id = #{value} order by dr.nx_ddr_route_seq

select dr.*, du.nx_DIU_wx_nick_name as driverName, du.nx_DIU_wx_phone as driverPhone from nx_dis_driver_route dr left join nx_distributer_user du on du.nx_distributer_user_id = dr.nx_ddr_driver_user_id where dr.nx_ddr_plan_id = #{planId} and dr.nx_ddr_driver_user_id = #{driverUserId} limit 1
mapper.update: update nx_dis_driver_route set nx_ddr_planned_depart_at = #{nxDdrPlannedDepartAt}, nx_ddr_planned_finish_at = #{nxDdrPlannedFinishAt}, nx_ddr_total_service_minutes = #{nxDdrTotalServiceMinutes}, nx_ddr_total_wait_minutes = #{nxDdrTotalWaitMinutes}, nx_ddr_total_late_minutes = #{nxDdrTotalLateMinutes}, nx_ddr_schedule_status = #{nxDdrScheduleStatus} where nx_ddr_id = #{nxDdrId}
